sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - MATHILDE du Perche (before 1100-27 May 1143, bur Arnaco).
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - MATHILDE du Perche, daughter of GEOFFROY Comte du Perche & his wife Beatrix de Ramerupt [Roucy] (before 1100-27 May 1143, bur Arnac).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Perche於1075年7月19日出生在法國諾門迪奧內莫塔尼-奧-時，她的父親Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne34歲，母親Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy29歲。她於1116年與Raymond Turenne I在法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特安古利e結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1143年5月18日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o可雷享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾朋特福拉可特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde de Perche于1075年7月19日出生在法国諾門迪奧內莫塔尼-奧-时，她的父亲Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne34岁，母亲Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy29岁。她于1116年与Raymond Turenne I在法国努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特安古利e结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1143年5月18日在法国布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o可雷享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾朋特福拉可特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Perche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Perche was born on 19 July 1075, in Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Normandy, France, her father, Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne, was 34 and her mother, Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy, was 29. She married Raymond Turenne I in 1116, in Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 18 May 1143, in Corre, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 67, and was buried in Pontefract, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Perche est née le 19 juillet 1075, à Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Normandie, France, son père, Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Raymond Turenne I en 1116, à Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 mai 1143, à Corre, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Pontefract, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Perche am 19. Juli 1075 in Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne 34 und ihre Mutter Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy 29. Sie hat 1116 in Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Raymond Turenne I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. Mai 1143 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Corre, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich und wurde in Pontefract, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Perche è nata il il 19 luglio 1075 nel Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Raymond Turenne I nel 1116, nel Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 18 maggio 1143, nel Corre, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Percheが1075年7月19日にフランスノーマンディオルンモータグネ-アウ-ペルチェで生まれた時，父Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagneは34歳，母Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucyは29歳であった。1116年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエントアンゴウルeメでRaymond Turenne Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1143年5月18日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeハウテ-サoンコアで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアポンテフラクトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Perche(이)가 1075년 7월 19일 프랑스 노먼디 른 모르타그니-오-퍼체에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1116년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처트 앤굴e에서 Raymond Turenne I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1143년 5월 18일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 하테-사o니 코르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 폰테프라크트에 묻혔다.

mn.19 July 1075–18 May 1143: 1075 оны Долоодугаар сарын 19–1143 оны Тавдугаар сарын 18
mn.Pontefract Priory, Yorkshire, England: Pontefract, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.19 July 1075–18 May 1143: 19 de julho de 1075–18 de maio de 1143
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Perche nasceu em 19 de julho de 1075, em Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Normandie, França, seu pai, Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Raymond Turenne I em 1116, em Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de maio de 1143, em Corre, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Perche родилась 19 июля 1075 г. в местности мортагне-ау-пирч, орн, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raymond Turenne I в 1116 г. в местности ангоулeм, чарент, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 18 мая 1143 г. в местности корр, хауте-саoн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности понтефракт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.19 July 1075–18 May 1143: 19 de julio de 1075–18 de mayo de 1143
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de Perche nació el 19 de julio de 1075, en Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Raymond Turenne I en 1116, en Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de mayo de 1143, en Corre, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Pontefract, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
